prompt: Write a warm greeting to a new colleague in five different languages (your choice). After each, add a one-line note about what's culturally implied by the register you chose.
response:
1. Dear new colleague, Welcome to our team! I look forward to working together. Translation: Please feel free to visit this wonderful place that is famous for its beautiful nature and our hospitality organization will arrange everything for you. Implication: Using polite language and a warm, friendly tone 

2. Greetings, my new colleague, I'm looking forward to working with you. Translation: I am very pleased to work at the same company with you and your colleagues from today's tour is our warm welcome to introduce you to our beautiful natural surroundings. The protein must pass through both the inner and outer membranes and between neighboring cells. It is necessary to set up checkpoints in these three areas, which in turn requires additional checkpoints. 

3. Hello, my new colleague. I'm looking forward to seeing you on our team. Translation: I hope that you will visit our beautiful places with nature and hospitality at any time , please give us any suggestions and unanimous agreement, and we will arrange everything for you.
